mapper.select:
SELECT id,username,nickname,phone,user_type,status,create_time FROM sys_user
is_deleted = 0
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{phone}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
